__fixture__.name: state_map_row_execution_context_cache
__fixture__.scenario: One row in the Appendix-F-style state map for the execution-context cache. The cache is a disposable_derived_cache: it may be cleared or reclaimed at any time, never syncs, is excluded from every portable profile, and is included in support bundles at metadata only. notes: Row is a disposable derived cache; a Clear action is always allowed and never needs a rollback checkpoint. A depends_on edge does not promote portability; the cache is local_only even though its upstream rows are shared-workspace-only or portable.
